subject: Improve docker image download script
commit_message:
Improve docker image download script

This is part of the series of changes that will improve
download scripts.

Issue-ID: OOM-1803

Change-Id: I6606762f8e05c25132257e5612997418a9d6d701
Signed-off-by: Milan Verespej <m.verespej@partner.samsung.com>

https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kubespray/tree/master/roles/download

Patch Set 30: Code-Review-1

it looks very good, but please consider also adding some text in output in case that download was skipped because docker image is already in local cache. I think it might be useful for later debugging when some issues appears. (it can be part debug output but preferably also in normal output)
